message:
docs: add MIT license and screenshot assets

Add MIT License:
- Copyright (c) 2025 Jeffrey Emanuel
- Standard MIT license terms for open source distribution

Add Screenshot Assets:
- screenshot_01__main_screen.webp: Main split view with list and details
- screenshot_02__insights_view.webp: Insights panel with graph metrics
- screenshot_03__kanban_view.webp: Kanban board flow visualization
- screenshot_04__graph_view.webp: Dependency DAG navigation view

These screenshots are referenced in the README.md screenshot gallery
to give users a visual preview of bv's capabilities.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
